title: Force-sensitive holding cell
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Dungeon_ship_holding_cell.jpg|thumb|right|250px]]
'''Force-sensitive holding cells''' were a form of technology designed to effectively prevent powerful [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] individuals from escaping using their [[The Force/Legends|Force]] abilities.

==History==
They were used widely during the height of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] following the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], though little is known about them except that one of these held [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] during his capture by the reborn [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor Palpatine]] on a customized [[Lictor-class dungeon ship|''Lictor''-class dungeon ship]]. It may be similar to the [[Jedi Temple detention center|Sith containment cells]] located on the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2000-04-05 -->[[Star Wars Handbook 3: Dark Empire|''Star Wars Handbook'' 3: ''Dark Empire'']]
